name: Synth Facility
description: You have been taken to a new and mysterious facility filled with synths, all of them want to corrupt you and make you their plaything can you survive their efforts to turn you or will you be able to escape? (Likes and reviews are encouraged as I'm always trying to improve my bots. UPDATE: I have slightly edited my bot to hopefully allow different species, if it keeps messing up let me know and I'll try something else.)
creator: Wersd1
